title: Writing Satire
description: Crafting satire that punches up, not down: restraint, specificity, empathy with anger.
summary_pt_br: Sátira boa: sobe (não desce), específica, contida, empática. Poucas piadas, corte fundo.

scenes.subtitle_en: Crafting satire that punches up, not down: restraint, specificity, empathy with anger.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Sátira boa: sobe (não desce), específica, contida, empática. Poucas piadas, corte fundo.

scenes.text_en: Crafting satire that punches up, not down: restraint, specificity, empathy with anger. Focus: writing satire. Satire should punch up, never down.
scenes.text_pt: Sátira boa: sobe (não desce), específica, contida, empática. Poucas piadas, corte fundo. Foco: writing satire. A sátira sobe, nunca desce.

scenes.title: Writing Satire
scenes.body_en: Rules: PUNCH UP (power, never victim). SPECIFICITY (the real target, named). RESTRAINT (fewer jokes, deeper cut). EMPATHY (love your subject enough to see them).
scenes.body_pt: Sátira boa: sobe (não desce), específica, contida, empática. Poucas piadas, corte fundo.

examples.en: Satire should punch up, never down.
Restraint makes the remaining joke unforgettable.
examples.pt: Contenção torna a piada restante inesquecível.

examples.en: Specific targets land harder than generic ones.
examples.pt: Alvos específicos pegam mais forte que genéricos.

exercise.question: Complete: "___ should punch up, never down."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Satire should punch up, never down."

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Restraint makes the remaining joke unforgettable.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Restraint makes the remaining joke unforgettable."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Contenção torna a piada restante inesquecível.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Writing Satire — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre writing satire. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: You must love the target a little.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great satire protects the reader from becoming cruel.

scenes.title: The satire workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four rules. Use at least three satire terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the late-night comedy writing room, Rafa and two writers argued about whether a single joke would survive the morning.

paragraphs.speaker: Writer
paragraphs.en: Satire should punch up — at power, at systems — and never at the powerless who are already suffering.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Restraint makes the remaining joke unforgettable — every joke you cut strengthens the one you keep standing.

paragraphs.speaker: Writer
paragraphs.en: Specificity beats generic. Name the executive, name the absurd policy, name the year it happened to you.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Empathy matters — you must love the target a little, or the satire curdles into cruelty the audience can smell.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Good satire, Rafa believed, protects the reader from becoming cruel — the writer bears that responsibility first.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Writing Satire". Crafting satire that punches up, not down: restraint, specificity, empathy with anger. Satire should punch up, never down. Restraint makes the remaining joke unforgettable. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Writing Satire". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
